attributes.action: Ban non stun Animal Slaughter immediately
attributes.background: Cruelty to animals is not allowed in this country . I want the British Government to immediately outlaw this dark ages barbaric activity and STOP this terrible cruelty. There is NO need for this to be happening in Great Britain  .

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

End slaughter of animals without prior stunning in the UK
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762122
